aquacroptools 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Regional Crop Simulations Using aquacroptools

Write AquaCrop Management File

Source: R/write_man.R
write_man.Rd

Write an AquaCrop v7.0 (August 2022) management (.MAN) file containing field and crop management parameters. This file specifies management practices such as mulch cover, soil fertility, weeds, and harvesting practices that will be applied during the AquaCrop simulation.

write_man(
  path = "man/",
  management_name = "generic-management",
  eol = "windows",
  params = list()
)

Arguments

path

Directory path where the output .MAN file will be written. Default = "man/"

management_name

Name identifier for the management scenario (used in output filename). Default = "generic-management"

eol

End-of-line character style for the output file. Options: "windows", "linux", "unix", or "macOS". Default = "windows"

params

Named list of management parameter values to override defaults from ManData. Parameter names should be var_02 through var_21 (e.g., list(var_02 = 7.0, var_04 = 50)). Unspecified parameters use default values from ManData. See details for complete parameter list and valid ranges.

Value

Invisibly returns the full path to the created .MAN file. Creates a colon-delimited .MAN file in the specified directory with the format: <<management_name>>.MAN containing management parameters and descriptions as required by AquaCrop v7.0.

Details

ManData contains 20 management parameters (var_02 to var_21) with the following valid ranges:

  • var_02: AquaCrop version (typically 7.0)

  • var_03: Ground surface covered by mulches (0-100 %)

  • var_04: Mulch effect on soil evaporation reduction (0-100 %)

  • var_05: Soil fertility stress degree (0-100 %)

  • var_06: Height of soil bunds (0+ m)

  • var_07: Surface runoff not affected by practices (0-100 %)

  • var_08: Surface runoff completely prevented (0-100 %)

  • var_09: Relative weed cover at canopy closure (0-100 %)

  • var_10: Increase of relative weed cover in mid-season (0+ %)

  • var_11: Shape factor of canopy cover expansion in weed field

  • var_12: Replacement by weeds of self-thinned cover (0-100 %)

  • var_13: Multiple cuttings flag (0 = not considered, 1 = considered)

  • var_14: Canopy cover after cutting (0-100 %)

  • var_15: Increase of Canopy Growth Coefficient after cutting (0+ %)

  • var_16: First day of cutting window (1+ days)

  • var_17: Number of days in cutting window (-9 = total cycle)

  • var_18: Timing of multiple cuttings

  • var_19: Time criterion for cuttings

  • var_20: Final harvest at maturity flag (0 = not considered, 1 = considered)

  • var_21: Start of growing cycle in cuttings list (1+ or -9)

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Write default management file
write_man(path = "management/", management_name = "default-management")

# Write custom management with modified parameters
write_man(
  path = "management/",
  management_name = "irrigated-maize",
  params = list(var_03 = 20, var_04 = 60, var_05 = 30)
)
} # }
